title: Ubiquiti LiteAP 5AC-17-90 GPS, LAP-GPS, 90°
category: Ubiquiti / Wireless / Outdoor units / AirMAX AC
description: LiteBeam 5AC-17-90 GPS is Base Station unit with Gigabit LAN port, integrated 17dBi and sector antenna with 90° beam angle. Unit is compatible only with airMAX AC CPE units and is designed for outdoor usage Thanks to the possible setting of the channel width 20/40/50/60 and 80MHz , real throughput of up to 450Mbps + can be achieved when using 256QAM LiteAPTM GPS supports GPS Sync for faster, more scalable, carrier-class networks, with higher throughout than competing solutions. GPS sync with airMAX AC delivers over 90% higher throughput than competing synchronized systems AirOS®8 provides powerful features, including airMAX® ac protocol support, real-time RF analytics, and an all-new design for enhanced usability Device Ball Joint Mount PoE power adapter 24V / 0.3A Power cord Metal ring
